channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Alphabet Inc. Stock: Shares Slide More Than 1.5% in Early Trading as Tech Sector Faces Geopolitical Pressure
item.description: Alphabet Inc. shares fell more than 1.5% in early trading Tuesday, March 24, 2026, as investors weighed ongoing uncertainty from the U.S.-Iran conflict and broader concerns about elevated energy costs impacting artificial intelligence infrastructure spending. [Alphabet, Intel]

item.title: SoftBank’s Son Says Ohio Data Center to Be $500 Billion Project
item.description: SoftBank Group Corp. is developing a data center-focused project in Ohio so massive that Chief Executive Officer Masayoshi Son said it would channel $500 billion into a single campus. “We are going to do the largest construction project in the …

item.title: Apple AI Pin Rumors: How This Tiny Device Plans to Replace Your Screen
item.description: Apple is reportedly developing a new wearable device known as the AI Pin. This compact, AI-driven gadget could reshape the landscape of personal technology by emphasizing artificial intelligence over traditional smartphone features. With a sleek design and ad… [Intel, Apple]

item.title: NeuReality taps former Google AI director to steer its inference operating system into the market
item.description: When Jensen Huang told 30,000 attendees at GTC last week that the future data centre is a “token factory,” he was describing a world that a small Israeli startup has been quietly building toward for months. NeuReality, the Caesarea-based company behind the NR… [Alphabet]
